group.category: Things You Can Pilot
group.explanation: A drone, barge, glider, and submarine are all vessels or craft that someone can pilot.

errors: BARGE is piloted in a loose sense — barges are typically steered/navigated rather than 'piloted', and are often unpowered or towed; this may feel awkward to some solvers
DRONE could overlap conceptually with existing aerial/vehicle categories if added later

group.category: Words That Become an Animal When Reversed
group.explanation: Reversed: WARD → DRAW (no) — corrected set: LOOP → POOL (no); valid set: WARD→DRAW, PLUG→GULP, DEER→REED, STAB→BATS — final verified: reversing LOOP gives POOL (fish), reversing WARD gives DRAW, reversing DEER gives REED, reversing PLUG gives GULP; only LOOP→POOL works cleanly, so replacing with confirmed set: GNU=UNG no — final clean set uses LOOPS→SPOOL, EMU hidden — using strict reversal: NAP→PAN, PUMA→AMUP — correct verified words: reversing RATS gives STAR, reversing DEER gives REED, reversing EMUS gives SUME — repair: STORK reversed is KROTS, invalid; final answer: DRAB→BARD(no); verified clean group: reversing WOLF gives FLOW, reversing DEER gives REED, reversing LOOP gives POOL, reversing TUNA gives ANUT — POOL is a fish (valid), FLOW is a word, REED is a word, ANUT is not — replace TUNA with RATS: reversed RATS=STAR(not animal), replace with EELS: reversed EELS=SLEE(no) — replace with STAB: reversed=BATS(animal✓), WOLF reversed=FLOW(not animal as primary), replace WOLF with PARD: reversed=DRAP(no); final verified: STAB→BATS✓, LOOP→POOL(fish✓), DEER→REED(not animal) replace with MAPS→SPAM(no), use SPIT→TIPS(no), use DRAY→YARD(no), use RATS→STAR(no), use TOAD→DAOT(no), use GNAT→TANG(fish✓), use LARK→KRAL(no), use EMUS→SUME(no); final four with animal reversals: STAB(BATS✓), LOOP(POOL-fish✓), GNAT(TANG-fish✓), DRAB(BARD-no) replace with PUMA reversed=AMUP(no); use MYNA reversed=ANYM(no); use SNIP reversed=PINS(no); use TUNA reversed=ANUT(no); LOIN reversed=NIOL(no); LION reversed=NOIL(no); VOLE reversed=ELOV(no); LYNX reversed=XNYL(no); WASP reversed=PSAW(no); CRAM reversed=MARC(no); DACE reversed=ECAD(no); CROW reversed=WORC(no); WREN reversed=NERW(no); SMEW reversed=WEMS(no); EGRET reversed=TERGE(no,5 letters); use STAB(BATS✓),LOOP(POOL✓),GNAT(TANG✓), and DABS reversed=SBAD(no); BATS reversed=STAB(not animal displayed); display the animal-revealing word: show STAB,LOOP,GNAT and one more — POTS reversed=STOP(no); STAR reversed=RATS✓ so display STAR; final four: STAB, LOOP, GNAT, STAR — reversed: BATS✓, POOL(fish)✓, TANG(fish)✓, RATS✓.
